Hearing held. The Court made the following ruling: Defendant Red-White Valve Corp.'s motion to continue trial date is granted. The trial date is continued to May 26, 2015 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Last day to hear Summary motions is May 21, 2015. Defendant demonstrated good cause for a continuance pursuant to C.R.C. 3.1332. Defendant's motion to reopen discovery is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 2024.050 and because plaintiff did not oppose such request if the Court decided to continue the trial date, which it has. Fact and expert discovery on the limited issue of plaintiff's bladder and kidney cancers is reopened and shall close on May 19, 2015. All other discovery remains closed. Defendant's motion to permit supplemental expert designations is granted pursuant to C.C.P. 2034.610 and 2034.620 and because plaintiff did not oppose such request if the Court decide to continue the trial date, which it has. Any defendant may augment its expert witness list and declaration by adding expert(s) but this is limited to experts designated based on plaintiff's bladder and kidney cancers diagnosis per code tracking the new trial date.
